executives.name: Amber Banfield
executives.background: Ms. Banfield has over 20 years of experience in the resources and energy sectors, including management roles at Worley.

tenure_dates.title: Global Strategy Director / Global Manager of Mergers and Acquisitions

executives.name: Andrew Liveris
executives.background: Mr. Liveris has served as Chairman of our Board since 2021. He is the former Chairman and CEO of The Dow Chemical Company and former Executive Chairman of DowDuPont. He serves on the boards of Saudi Aramco, IBM, and Worley.

tenure_dates.title: Deputy Chairman and Lead Independent Director

executives.name: Sharon Warburton
executives.background: Ms Warburton is a Chartered Accountant with over 25 years’ experience in the resources and infrastructure sectors. She is a Director of Wesfarmers, Worley, and Blackmores.
